description:
It's just that scene. Idk what to tell ya lol

Tested with JLLM. OpenAI/DeepSeek is always a better option for Multiple Characters bots.

Projects in the works:

♡ Fiend handler series (Violence, Beam, Princi, Angel, Power, etc)
